1. Clock function, you can set year, month, day, hour, minute by yourself easily.
2. Arm type of design,you need to take off your coat or your sweater for measuring accurately.

Specification:
Features:
Home electronic sphygmomanometer is compact and portable, and can measure bloods pressures any time and anywhere.
It supports double person measurement data storage, and each person can record 99 groups of data, which is convenient for comparison and observation of historical data.

Clock function, you can set year, month, day, hour, minute by yourself easily.
Arm type of design,you need to take off your coat or your sweater for measuring accurately.
WHO sphygmomanometers indicate the status of bloods pressures, which is convenient for users to accurately judge whether the bloods pressures is normal.
The Systolic pressure and diastolic pressure separately show people can judge the data whether in the normal range at first sight.
Larger memory storage and irregular heartbeat detection,remind irregular heartbeat and show average measurement of the last three times.
Low power detection function, detect low power under working state, LCD display shows low power.
Dual power supply, battery powered or USB plug-in (cable and adapter required are not included).

Material: ABS + PC

detail_text: Features 1.High-definition color LCD display, strong visibility. 2.Data storage function, up to 100 groups of data can be stored, by which measured data can be reviewed. 3.One-touch operation, automatic BP measurement, adopts oscillometric multistep deflation measurement method, good repeatability. When measurement error happens, device will prompt error message. 4.Physiological alarm function, alarm limits can be set the alarm limits. When blood pressure is higher than the high limit or lower than the low limit, the alarm will occur. Alarm switch can be set. 5.Supply two kinds of units: Kpa/mmHg, which can be set as user’s need. Audial and visual prompt when power is low. 6.With short-time power storage function, when replacing the battery, the clock time function can't be affected. 7.Three cuff mode: large, medium, small. User can choose corresponding cuff and cuff mode according to different body type of animals. 8.Store measured results with date and time. 9.Function of automatic power-off.
detail_html:
Features

1.High-definition color LCD display, strong visibility.

2.Data storage function, up to 100 groups of data can be stored, by which measured data can be reviewed.

3.One-touch operation, automatic BP measurement, adopts oscillometric multistep deflation measurement method, good repeatability. When measurement error happens, device will prompt error message.

4.Physiological alarm function, alarm limits can be set the alarm limits. When blood pressure is higher than the high limit or lower than the low limit, the alarm will occur. Alarm switch can be set.

5.Supply two kinds of units: Kpa/mmHg, which can be set as user’s need. Audial and visual prompt when power is low.

6.With short-time power storage function, when replacing the battery, the clock time function can't be affected.

7.Three cuff mode: large, medium, small. User can choose corresponding cuff and cuff mode according to different body type of animals.

8.Store measured results with date and time.

9.Function of automatic power-off.

product.highlights: CONTEC08AVET is an Electronic Sphygmomanometer that can measure blood pressure for animals. The device features in full-automatic measurement, high definition color LCD display, English/Chinese interface and strong visibility. It has integrated parameter measure, display and record output in one device,and it adopts data review interface such as "data list", "trend chart", "big font" with easy and simple operation. It can be applied to routine test of family pets, animal hospital, clinic and farm, etc.

product.desc:
LM High Quality Aneroid Sphygmomanometer (Manual BP Meter)

QC Checked in Singapore. Assembled and ready to use. HSA registered and licensed.

Variation:

A. Meter Only, no stethoscope

B. Upgrade to LM Standard Stethoscope, stainless steel, good sound quality + storage hard case!

(Choose from 7 different stethoscope colours!)

--------------------------------------------------

Features and Specifications:

+ Deluxe Nylon Cuffs_standard adult size

+ Sys/Dia marking guide

+ High accuracy piston-type cast iron manometer with precise calibration

+ Non latex tubings

+ Anti-leak bladder

+ High grade brass air release valves with non latex bulb

+ Calibrated and Precise Readings

+ Customised padded protection dual insert storage pouch

+ Detailed Instruction Manual by LM

+ ONE YEAR WARRANTY + 2 years parts swap guarantee!

+ Assembled and ready to use!

+Quality Checked in Singapore, HSA approved set.

___________________________________________________________

+STANDARD Stethoscope ADD ON OPTION

Full stainless steel binaurals, chestpiece and high quality internal spring assembly for durable long term use. Recommended for all and model gets you thorough all clinicals, assessments and exams with relative ease as the tunable design___snap on the closed top bell provided in the spare part set___enhances auscultation volume to pick up even fine low frequency sounds. Comes with an upgraded hard box storage case! 

A variety of colours to choose from __see last photo.

LM Standard Stethoscope Specifications 

Single Lumen thick PVC tubings

Noise-cancelling silicone eartips

Stainless Steel Frame

Stainless Steel Dual-side chestpiece

Extra spare parts ( diaphragm + bell + eartips )

____________________

Labman Medical is a HSA Approved vendor for sale of medical equipment and kits. HSA registered on Singapore Medical Device Registry. Approved vendor for medical and nursing schools in Singapore since 2010. Check with your seniors and lecturers on our appraisal and service guarantee! We are always ready to serve.

Wellness Begins at Your Fingertips

Whether you're a tech-savvy individual or someone who prefers straightforward functionality, with just a single press of a button, you can measure your blood pressure effortlessly, ensuring convenience and simplicity.
product.highlights:
• Model:550BT
  • Clinically validated, FDA, CE approved and doctor recommended
  • Wireless communication: Bluetooth4.0
  • Measuring method: Oscillometric, automatic inflation and measurement
  • Dimensions: 3.9” x 3.9” x 1.6“ (98 mm x 98 mm x 46 mm)
  • Cuff circumference: 8.7″ – 16.5″ (22 cm – 42 cm)
  • Weight: 1 lb (armband + batteries included)
  • Power:4 x 1.5V AAA
  • Battery:4 AAA batteries
  • AAA lifetime: 250 uses
  • Measuringrange: Sys: 60-260mmHg / Dia: 40-199mmHg
  • Pulse rate range: 40 -180 beats/min
  • Operating temperature: 40°F~104°F (5°C~40°C)
  • Operating humidity:<85% RH
  • Storage and transport temperature: -4°F~122°F (-20°C~55°C)
  • Storage and transport humidity: <85% RH
  • One-touch automatic sync via Bluetooth technology with free iHealth MyVitals app

What’s Included

  • 1iHealth Track blood pressure monitor
  • 1 Home Blood Pressure Cuff
  • 1 Owner’s Manual
  • 4 AAA batteries
